ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., Private, Local-gov) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numerical representation of education level */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains earned by the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses incurred by the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Average hours worked per week */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the individual */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the individual */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., Employed, Unemployed) */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES work_classes ("workclass_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES educations ("education_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race FOREIGN KEY ("race") REFERENCES races ("race_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country FOREIGN KEY ("native_country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship FOREIGN KEY ("relationship") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_classes" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class (e.g., Private, Local-gov) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., HS-grad, Some-college) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Married-civ-spouse, Divorced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Adm-clerical, Machine-op-inspct) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status (e.g., Own-child, Husband) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., United-States) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_gain_loss" (
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capital gain/loss entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual associated with this entry */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains earned by the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses incurred by the individual */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the capital gain or loss occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capital_gain_loss_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hours_worked" (
  "hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hours worked entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the individual associated with this entry */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Average hours worked per week */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the hours were worked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hours_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hours_worked_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)
